CreateFileset.action: Fixed value for this API: CreateFileset
CreateFileset.instanceId: Short instance ID of the PFS instance where the fileset will be created
CreateFileset.filesetName:
Name of the fileset to create
  • Length: 1–128 characters (letters or Chinese characters).
  • Must start with a letter (upper or lower case) or a Chinese character.
  • May contain digits, Chinese characters, colons (:), underscores (_), or hyphens (-)
CreateFileset.filesetPath:
Absolute path within the PFS file system for the new fileset.
  • Must be a new path that does not already exist.
  • Must begin with a forward slash (/), e.g. /filepath; the path will be created automatically.
  • The parent directory must be an existing regular directory.
  • Maximum path depth: 8 levels.
  • Maximum total path length: 1013 characters.
  • Maximum length of a single directory name: 255 characters
CreateFileset.blockQuota:
Storage capacity quota in GB.
  • Defines the maximum writable capacity for the fileset; no new data can be written once the quota is reached.
  • Cannot exceed the total capacity of the PFS file system instance.
  • Set to 0 or leave unset for unlimited
CreateFileset.filesQuota:
File count quota.
  • Defines the maximum number of files and directories that can be created in the fileset; no new data can be written once the quota is reached.
  • Maximum configurable value is 3 billion; submit a ticket to request a higher limit.
  • Set to 0 or leave unset for unlimited
CreateFileset.qpsLimit:
IOPS limit.
  • Specifies the maximum IOPS QoS for the fileset (excluding DIO); traffic throttling is triggered when the fileset's IOPS usage reaches this threshold
CreateFileset.bandwidthLimitMb:
Bandwidth limit in MB.
  • Specifies the maximum throughput QoS for the fileset (excluding DIO); traffic throttling is triggered when the fileset's throughput usage reaches this threshold
